info.title: SQuinia Backend
info.description: Production-grade FastAPI backend with async operations, JWT auth, and RBAC

post.description: Exchange email and password for access and refresh tokens.
Rotate tokens using a valid refresh token.

get.description:
Current user plus org memberships for shell routing (learner vs org operator).

``data.user`` includes ``onboarding`` and ``onboarding_completed_at``.
``data.memberships`` lists active tenants with ``tenant_name`` / ``tenant_slug`` / ``org_role``.
``data.default_tenant_id`` matches the first membership (same ordering as JWT default tenant).

post.description: Requires Bearer token with `tenant_id` claim. Caller must be ORG_OWNER or ORG_ADMIN in that tenant.

get.description: List platform users (platform admin or owner).
Get a user by id (self or platform staff).

patch.description: Update profile or staff fields (authorization enforced in service).

delete.description: Soft-delete a user (platform admin or owner).

get.description: Return basic tenant fields if the current user has an active membership in this tenant.

CohortMemberRole.title: CohortMemberRole
CohortMemberRole.description: Role a user plays inside a cohort.

role.description: Organization role granted when the invite is accepted (typically STUDENT or INSTRUCTOR).

CreateTenantInviteRequest.title: CreateTenantInviteRequest
CreateTenantInviteRequest.description: Invite someone to the current JWT tenant.

cohort_id.title: Cohort Id
cohort_id.description: Cohort context; optional if the product allows free practice in-tenant.

mode.description: Interaction mode for the session (e.g. TEXT).

SimulationSessionStartRequest.title: SimulationSessionStartRequest
SimulationSessionStartRequest.description:
Start a persisted simulation session (call ``POST /api/v1/sessions`` before opening the sim UI).

``tenant_id`` is taken from the access token, not the body.
